title: Boutique Cherry Blossom & Peony Fragrance Body Wash 500ml - Refreshing - Cleansing - Essential Oils - Vegan and Cruelty Free - No SLS or Parabens - Made In England - Recyclable Bottle
features: BODY WASH: Gently cleanses with a light scent, leaving skin soft and beautifully fragranced. Formulated with a Coconut Oil derivative deeply cleanses and Lactic Acid hydrates and moisturises.
FRAGRANCE: A light and feminine fragrance. Delicate pink Cherry Blossoms offer a sweet note, marrying floral and fruit, whilst Peony delivers a well rounded, beautifully soft bloom to enjoy.
FRAGRANCE NOTES: Top: Bergamot, Grapefruit, Cassis - Middle: Orris, Jasmine, Orange Blossom, Lily, Cherry Blossom - Base: Vanilla, Tonka, Praline, Patchouli, Cedarwood, White Musk, Ambergris.
ESSENTIAL OILS: Featuring a relaxing blend of essential oils of Warm Cherry Blossom & Peony. Let the calming aroma transport you to a state of tranquility, leaving your senses rejuvenated.
VALUES: Proudly crafted in England with vegan ingredients, sourced sustainably. This body wash is formulated without silicones, SLS, or harsh ingredients. Cruelty free and our packaging is recyclable
description: Product Description Indulge in a luxurious cleansing experience with our Body Wash, meticulously crafted to leave your skin feeling irresistibly soft and delicately fragranced. Its gentle formula, enhanced with a Coconut Oil derivative, ensures thorough cleansing without stripping away moisture, while Lactic Acid works to hydrate and moisturise, leaving your skin refreshed and rejuvenated after every use. Immerse yourself in the enchanting aroma of our Body Wash, exuding a light and feminine fragrance that captivates the senses. Delicate pink Cherry Blossoms lend a sweet note, blending harmoniously with the soft, rounded bloom of Peony, creating an exquisite journey that uplifts and delights. Enriched with a restorative blend of essential oils, including Warm Cherry Blossom and Peony, our Body Wash offers more than just cleansing—it's a sanctuary of tranquillity. Let the calming aroma transport you to a state of serenity, revitalising your senses and soothing your soul with each application. Committed to excellence and sustainability, our Body Wash is proudly crafted in England using vegan ingredients sourced ethically. Free from silicones, SLS, and harsh additives, it upholds our dedication to purity and quality. Plus, our cruelty-free approach ensures that no animals are harmed in the creation of our products. Complete with recyclable packaging, our Body Wash embodies our commitment to both luxury and environmental responsibility, making it a guilt-free indulgence for body and mind alike. Ingredients Aqua (Water), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum (Fragrance), Lactic Acid, Benzophenone-4, Disodium EDTA, Polyquaternium-7, Sodium Benzoate, Linalool, CI 17200 (Red 33), CI 19140 (Yellow 5). Directions Lather the rich, moisturising formula with warm water, massage onto skin and enjoy the sumptuous fragrance. Rinse well. Safety Warning For External Use Only See more
